cases.label: Tenant boundary clarity
cases.summary: Generated apps must keep tenant boundaries explicit.
details: multi-tenant ready with tenant-scoped business entities
Generated customer apps own their own business records, workflow outcomes, and approval decisions. The factory only owns advisory specs, compiler metadata, job metadata, and generation artifacts.

cases.label: Approval coverage
cases.summary: Irreversible and bulk actions should remain approval-gated.
details: Urgent Replacement Approval: A workflow requests an urgent replacement, swap, or status override.
Inventory Disposition Approval: An operator attempts to retire, dispose, or write off tracked equipment.
Bulk Import Approval: A CSV or integration batch affects multiple tenant-scoped records.
Role and Permission Change Approval: An admin modifies role definitions, privileged permissions, or approval scopes.
Urgent replacement approval: Any workflow action classified as Urgent replacement approval.
Bulk inventory changes: Any workflow action classified as Bulk inventory changes.

cases.label: Module coverage
cases.summary: The generated runtime kit should cover dashboard, data, workflow, governance, and settings surfaces.

cases.label: Adapter boundaries
cases.summary: Adapters should remain explicit, typed, and operator-reviewable.

cases.label: Human editability
cases.summary: Operators should have obvious post-generation edit surfaces.

cases.label: Design handoff completeness
cases.summary: Design export should contain tokens, screen inventory, and content model artifacts.

cases.label: Uncertainty visibility
cases.summary: The compiler must keep assumptions and missing context visible.
